Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: photographic prints by process [300138213], photographic prints [300127104], positives (photographs) [300138191], photographs by form [300127008], photographs [300046300], visual works by material or technique [300191091], visual works (works) [300191086], Visual Works (hierarchy name) [300179869], Visual and Verbal Communication (hierarchy name) [300264552], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Photographic prints made by chromogenic color processes.
Úsese para impresiones fotográficas realizadas por procesos cromogénicos de color.
Fotografische afdrukken vervaardigd met chromogene procédés.
Fotoabzug, der durch das chromogene Verfahren entstanden ist.

Source.Source_ID: 2000037531/Greenough et al., On the Art of Fixing a Shadow (1989)
2000017031/Zinkham and Parker, Descriptive Terms for Graphic Materials (1986)
